comments.main: expo/AppEntry.js loads App.tsx at the project root. Switched away from expo-router/entry (that pkg isn't installed) so Metro can find a bundle entry point.
comments.@expo/metro-runtime: Required for Metro web target (`expo start --web`). Auto-added by `npx expo install`.
comments.@react-native-async-storage/async-storag: Pinned to 1.23.1 — the version that pairs with Expo SDK 51. Don't bump independently or `expo doctor` will complain.
comments.expo-linear-gradient: Added in PR #103 for the gradient brand strips on screen headers (Today greeting, Login, etc).
comments.lucide-react-native: Same icon set as the web app. Keeps visual parity between platforms.
comments.expo-notifications: Wired but inert until a server-side trigger is added (PR #104). Still needs to be installed at scaffold time so the AndroidManifest gets the right permissions.
comments.react-dom + react-native-web: Required for `expo start --web` preview. Have no effect on the Android bundle.
comments.react-native-url-polyfill: Required by @supabase/supabase-js in React Native — its fetch/url shims fix the 'URL is not defined' runtime error you'd otherwise see on first auth call.
